amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 3 — paragraph 1 — point 33 d (new)
parliament_text:
(33d) ‘special categories of personal data’ means the categories of personal data referred to in Article 9(1) of Regulation (EU)2016/679;

‘special categories of personal data’ means the categories of personal data referred to in Article 9(1) of Regulation (EU)2016/679;
